channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Landslide in Wayanad: Rescue operations underway after twin-tunnel construction site incident
item.description: A landslip occurred at the Anakkampoyil–Kalladi–Meppadi twin-tunnel road construction site near Meenakshi Bridge in Wayanad district on July 7, 2026. At least two workers were rescued and rushed to th...

item.title: South Korea Faces Criticism Over Detention of Elderly Church Leader in Political Case
item.description: South Korea has faced international criticism after detaining 95-year-old Shincheonji Church of Jesus chairman Lee Man-hee on charges related to a political party case. Prosecutors allege Lee organize...

item.title: Gauteng surpasses Lenacapavir rollout target in first month
item.description: The Gauteng health department has surpassed its monthly target for distributing Lenacapavir, a long-acting HIV prevention medication, with over 6,130 eligible individuals initiated on the drug between...

item.title: New Study Suggests Earth May Survive Sun's Expansion in 5 Billion Years
item.description: A recent study challenges the long-held belief that Earth will be consumed by the Sun in 5 billion years. Researchers analyze the Sun's life cycle, noting that as it evolves into a red giant, its expa...

item.title: Nigeria's anti-corruption spending under Tinubu faces mixed results
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has allocated more funds to Nigeria's anti-corruption agencies than his predecessor Muhammadu Buhari, but the effectiveness of these measures remains debated. Over three years in...

item.title: Union Environment Minister Bhupender Yadav's Office Sees Removal Of Private Secretary And Two Additional Secretaries
item.description: The Ministry Of Environment, Forest And Climate Change has relieved the private secretary and two additional secretaries of their duties from the office of Union environment minister Bhupender Yadav. ...

item.title: Canada's ETF Industry Faces U.S. Competition with New Share Classes
item.description: Canada's exchange-traded funds (ETF) industry is preparing for increased competition from new U.S.-listed ETF share class products that could divert Canadian investment dollars south of the border. Th...

item.title: Community-led immigration eviction sparks debate on humane treatment in South Africa
item.description: Approximately 200 immigrants were forcibly removed from Vleifontein and surrounding villages in Limpopo province, South Africa, by local residents with police assistance. The evicted individuals, incl...

item.title: Pakistan and Kyrgyzstan Strengthen Bilateral Ties Through Trade and Economic Cooperation
item.description: The article highlights the joint commitment of Pakistan and Kyrgyzstan to enhance bilateral relations through expanded trade and economic cooperation. Leaders emphasized collaboration in critical sect...

item.title: PEBEC Announces 16 MDAs Meet Full Business Reform Compliance
item.description: The Presidential Enabling Business Environment Council (PEBEC) has announced that 16 Ministries, Departments, and Agencies (MDAs) fully implemented key business reforms in its 2026 midterm assessment....

item.title: Lauren Bennett, LMFAO collaborator and mental health advocate, passes away at 37
item.description: Lauren Bennett, the singer who contributed to LMFAO’s iconic hit ‘Party Rock Anthem’, has passed away at the age of 37. Her former girl group, G.R.L., announced her death via an Instagram statement, e...

item.title: NACC Staff Reactions to Leadership Criticism and Government Response Gaps
item.description: The article reveals internal NACC staff emails showing their reactions to an investigative piece highlighting the commission's leadership failures and lack of accountability. Outgoing Commissioner Pau...

item.title: Jeff Bezos's Shift in Allegiance: From Defiance to Support of Trump's Administration
item.description: The article examines Jeff Bezos's transformation from a vocal critic of Donald Trump to a prominent supporter of his administration. Initially, Bezos opposed Trump's policies, publicly criticized his ...

item.title: Canada Strengthens NATO Commitments Through Submarine Procurement Amid U.S. Uncertainty
item.description: Canada's finance minister, Chrystia Freeland (Carney), is navigating complex geopolitical and economic challenges as the country seeks to bolster its defense capabilities amid heightened tensions with...

item.title: Evo Lounge Closes After Three Years, Fans React with Mixed Feelings
item.description: The iconic Rongai nightclub Evo Lounge has officially shut down after three years of operation, marking the end of an era for Nairobi's nightlife scene. The club, which was a popular spot for music lo...

item.title: Cross River State Launches Seven-Year Coffee Development Plan to Diversify Economy
item.description: The Cross River State Government has launched a seven-year coffee development plan aimed at boosting the economy, creating jobs, and diversifying income sources. The initiative, called the 'Coffee Rev...

item.title: Tanzania Raises Central Bank Rate to 6.25% for Q3 2026, GDP Growth at 6% in H1 2026
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BOT) raised the Central Bank Rate (CBR) from 5.75% to 6.25% for Q3 2026 to combat inflation driven by global energy, fertilizer, and transportation costs linked to Middle East ge...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Defense Fails to Prove Innocence
item.description: The House prosecution panel, led by Rep. Renee Co, stated that Vice President Sara Duterte's defense team did not categorically assert her innocence during the impeachment trial. Co emphasized that th...

item.title: Security challenges in Syria amid explosions during Macron's visit
item.description: Two bombs exploded near the hotel in Damascus where French President Emmanuel Macron held meetings, according to Syrian state media. The blasts occurred in a busy area between the Syrian tourism minis...

item.title: Nashville's Tornado Threat Shifts: Local Volunteers Play Key Role in Community Safety
item.description: The article explores how the pattern of tornadoes in Nashville, Tennessee, is evolving, placing more families at risk. A volunteer-run service called Nashville Severe Weather has emerged as a critical...
